conbody.p: Overview: As a CDI Manager, I need a CDS Review Activity dashboard so that I can view the review activities performed by the CDS and analyze their productivity.

You can view the individual and detailed performance of the CDSs to analyze their activity. Select a CDS, right-click, and select Drill through CDS Performance , the system navigates to the CDS Performance tab. This tab displays all the data for the selected CDS.When the CDS Performance tab appears, from the title of the tab, click CTRL + to go back to the previous tab (from the tab you have used the Drill through) command). In this case, it is CDS Review Activity.
Navigation: On the Analytics home page left side panel, navigate to CDE One Staff Management CDS Review Activity .

CDS Review Activity displays the following:
KPI Cards - Initial Reviews Per Day, Additional Reviews Per Day, Total Reviews Per Day
CDS Review Activity chart
On the top panel, you can select desired values for the slicers (refer ) and the corresponding data gets filtered in the tabular chart.

Default Display: Report will display the data for last 1 calendar month based on the Activity Date. By default, the dashboard displays the data for the inpatient encounters for which activity has been performed in the last one calendar month. Click the ‘Reset’ button to reset the activity date and select the required date. Total column displays the row-level grand totals for the selected period. For the percentage metrics, this column displays the overall percentage for the selected period.

entry.p: This KPI metric displays the average daily initial reviews performed by the CDS for the selected Activity Date range.
Rounded to 0 decimal places
Example: For last 1 week Activity date, this metric displays the average daily initial reviews by the CDS.

p.note: Initial Review Date/Time falls in the selected activity date range.

entry.p: Initial Reviews Per Day = (Total number of Initial Reviews with the Initial Review Date in the selected activity date range/ No. of days CDS worked in the selected activity date range )
Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.
This KPI metric displays the average daily additional reviews performed by the CDS for the selected Activity Date range
Example: For last 1 week Activity date, this metric displays out of the total number of days CDS's worked, the count of additional reviews done.
Rounded to 0 decimal places

p.note:
Additional Review Date/Time falls in the selected activity date range.
Activity Type 'Post-Discharge Reviews' is not considered as an Additional Review by the CDS.

entry.p: Additional Reviews Per Day = (Total number of Additional Reviews with the additional Review Date in the selected activity date range/ No. of days CDS worked in the selected activity date range)
Additional Reviews for Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.
This KPI metric displays the daily total reviews performed by the CDS for the selected Activity Date range
Rounded to 0 decimal places

p.note:
Additional Review Date/Time falls in the selected activity date range.
Initial Review Date/Time falls in the selected activity date range.
Activity Type 'Post-Discharge Reviews' is not considered as an Additional Review by the CDS.

entry.p: Total Reviews Per Day = (Total number of Initial and Additional Reviews with the Initial Review Date and additional Review Date in the selected activity date range/ No. of days CDS worked in the selected activity date range)
Initial and Additional Reviews for Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.

ul.li: By default, the chart displays the data for the activity performed by the CDS in the last 1 calendar month.
The chart displays review activity for every 'Initiating' CDS in the selected date range.

li.p: Column headers in the chart display CDS in the format Last Name, First Name (CDS ID).

ul.li: The data in the chart is sorted based on CDS alphabetically

entry.p: This metric displays the count of encounters with an initial review date/time in the selected activity date range.

p.note: Initial Review Date/Time falls in the selected activity date range.

row.entry: Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.

entry.p: This metric displays the count of additional reviews performed in the selected activity date range.

p.note: Additional Review Date/Time falls in the selected activity date range.

entry.p: Additional Review Types:

ul.li: Clarification creation
Clarification modification
Working review modification
Worksheet creation or modification
Possible review creation
Possible review modification
Reconciliation assessment creation
Reconciliation assessment modification
Encounter Saved
Note creation or modification
Tracking Codes Addition or Modification
Encounter status modification

entry.p: Activity Type 'Post-Discharge Review' is not considered in the Additional Reviews calculation.
Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.

row.entry:
This metric displays the count of total reviews performed in the selected activity date range.
Review Date/Time (Initial Review and Additional Review dates) falls in the selected activity date range.

entry.p: Total Reviews = (Initial Reviews + Additional Reviews)
Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.
This metric displays the count of encounters with at least one clarification sent in the selected activity date range.

p.note: Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range.

entry.p: Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.

row.entry:
This metric displays the percentage of reviewed encounters with at least one clarification with the status other than DELETED or RETRACTED in the selected activity date range.
Rounded off to 0 decimal places. Example: 30%
Initial Review Date/Time falls in the selected activity date range.
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range.

entry.p: Encounter Clarification Rate= (The count of reviewed encounters with at least one clarification with the status other than DELETED or RETRACTED sent in the selected activity date range./ Count of Initial Reviews performed in the selected activity date range.) *100
Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.
This metric displays the count of clarifications with at-least one instance sent in the selected activity date range.

p.note: Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range. (Start and End Date)

entry.p: Clarifications may or may not have a FINAL response.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.

row.entry:
This metric displays the count of clarifications with at least one instance responded against the clarification sent in the selected activity date range.
Note:
Response is treated as an attribute to the clarification sent.
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range. (Start and End Date).
Instance Response Date may not fall in the selected activity date range.
Clarification Instance may or may not have a FINAL response.
Clarifications with response other than Pending, Retracted, or No Response are considered.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.

entry.p: This metric displays the percentage of clarifications responded against the clarification sent in the selected activity date range.

Clarification Response Rate= (The count of clarifications with at least one instance responded against the clarification sent in the selected activity date range/ The count of clarification with at-least one instance sent in the selected activity date range) x 100
Rounded off to 0 decimal places. Example: 80%
Response is treated as an attribute to the clarification sent.
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range. (Start and End Date).
Clarifications with response other than Pending, Retracted, or No Response are considered.
Clarification Instance may or may not have a FINAL response.
Rounded off to 0 decimal places. E.g. 80%
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
This metric displays the count of clarifications agreed against the clarification sent in the selected activity date range.
Response is treated as an attribute to the clarification sent.
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range. (Start and End Date).
Response Date/time of the 'Agreed' instance may not fall in the selected activity date range.
Clarifications may not have a FINAL response.
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
This metric displays the percentage of responded clarifications agreed against the clarification sent in the selected activity date range.
Rounded to 0 decimal places. Eg: 89%
Response is treated as an attribute to the clarification sent.
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range. (Start and End Date).
Instance Response Date may not fall in the selected activity date range.
Response Date/time of the 'Agreed' instance may not fall in the selected activity date range.
Clarifications may not have a FINAL response.
Clarification Instance may or may not have a FINAL response.
Clarifications with response other than Pending, Retracted, or No Response are considered as responded.

row.entry: Clarification Agreed Rate = (The count of Clarifications agreed against the clarifications sent in the selected activity date range (Response Date/time of the 'Agreed' instance may/may not fall in the selected activity date range)/ The count of clarifications with at-least one instance responded against the clarification instance sent in the selected activity date range) x 100. Rounded to 0 decimal places. E.g. 89%

entry.p: Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Clarifications with response other than Pending, Retracted, or No Response are considered as responded.
This metric displays the count of reviewed encounters with at least one Financial Impact clarification sent in the selected activity date range.

p.note: Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range.

entry.p: Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial or BOTH’ in the admin configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.
This metric displays the percentage of reviewed Encounters with at least one Financial Impact Clarifications sent in the selected activity date range.
Rounded off to 0 decimal places. Example: 30%

p.note: Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range.

entry.p: Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial ’ in the admin configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.

Financial Impact Clarification Rate = (Count of reviewed encounters with at least one Financial Impact clarification with the status other than DELETED or RETRACTED in the selected activity date range. / Count of encounters with an initial review date in the selected activity date range.) X 100
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
This metric displays the count of Financial Impact clarification with at-least one instance sent in the selected activity date range.

p.note: Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range.

entry.p: Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial’ in the admin configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
This metric displays the percentage of Financial Impact Clarifications sent in the selected activity date range.
Rounded off to 0 decimal places. Example: 30%

p.note: Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range.

entry.p: Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial ’ in the admin configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.

%Financial Impact Clarification = (The count of Financial Impact clarification with at-least one instance in the selected activity date range. / The count of clarifications with at-least one instance in the selected activity date range.) X100
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
This metric displays the count of Financial Impact clarifications with at least one instance responded in the selected activity date range.
Response is treated as an attribute to the clarification sent.
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range. (Start and End Date)
Instance Response Date may or may not fall in the selected activity date range.
Clarifications may or may not have a FINAL response.
Clarifications with response other than Pending, Retracted, or No Response are considered.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial’ in the admin configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
This metric displays the percentage of sent Financial Impact clarifications responded in the selected activity date range.
Rounded to 0 decimal places. Example: 89%
Response is treated as an attribute to the clarification sent.
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range. (Start and End Date)
Clarifications may or may not have a FINAL response.
Clarifications with response other than Pending, Retracted, or No Response are considered.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial’ in the admin configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation

Financial Impact Clarification Response Rate= (The count of Financial Impact clarifications with at least one instance responded in the selected activity date range/ The count of Financial Impact clarifications with at-least one instance sent in the selected activity date range) x 100
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
This metric displays the count of Financial Impact Clarificationsagreed in the selected activity date range.
Response is treated as an attribute to the clarification sent.
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range. (Start and End Date).
Response Date/time of the 'Agreed' instance may or may not fall in the selected activity date range.
Clarifications may or may not have a FINAL response.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial’ in the admin configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Financial Impact Clarification Agreed Rate
This metric displays the percentage of responded Financial Impact clarifications agreed in the selected activity date range.
Rounded to 0 decimal places. : 89%
Response is treated as an attribute to the clarification sent.
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range. (Start and End Date).
Instance Response Date may or may not fall in the selected activity date range.
Response Date/time of the 'Agreed' instance may or may not in the selected activity date range.
Clarifications may or may not have a FINAL response.
Clarifications with response other than Pending, Retracted, or No Response are considered as responded.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial’ in the admin configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

Financial Impact Clarification Agreed Rate = (The count of Financial Impact Clarifications agreed in the selected activity date range (Response Date/time of the 'Agreed' instance falls in the selected activity date range)/ the count of Financial Impact clarifications with at least one instance responded in the selected activity date range) x 100
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
This metric displays the count of reviewed encounters with at least one quality Impact clarification sent in the selected activity date range.
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Quality or BOTH’ in the admin configuration are considered.
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.
This metric displays the percentage of reviewed Encounters with Quality Impact Clarifications sent in the selected activity date range.
Rounded off to 0 decimal places. Example: 30%
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range.
Initial Review Date falls in the selected activity date range.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Quality or BOTH’ in the admin configuration are considered.

Quality Clarification Rate = (Count of reviewed encounters with at least one Quality Impact clarification with the status other than DELETED or RETRACTED sent in the selected activity date range. / Count of encounters with an initial review date in the selected activity date range.) X 100
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.
This metric displays the count of Quality Impact clarification with at-least one instance sent in the selected activity date range.

p.note: Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range.

entry.p: Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Quality’ in the admin configuration is a Quality Impact Clarification.
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
This metric displays the percentage of Quality Impact Clarifications sent in the selected activity date range.
Rounded off to 0 decimal places. Example: 30%

p.note: Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range.

entry.p: Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Quality’ in the admin configuration is a Quality Impact Clarification.

% Quality Clarification = (The count of Quality Impact clarification with at-least one instance in the selected activity date range. / The count of clarifications with at-least one instance in the selected activity date range.) X100
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
This metric displays the count of Quality Impact clarifications with at least one instance responded in the selected activity date range.
Response is treated as an attribute to the clarification sent.
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range. (Start and End Date).
Instance Response Date may or may not fall in the selected activity date range.
Clarifications may or may not have a FINAL response.
Clarifications with response other than Pending, Retracted, or No Response are considered.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Quality’ in the admin configuration is a Quality Impact Clarification.
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
This metric displays the percentage of sent Quality Impact clarifications responded in the selected activity date range.
Rounded to 0 decimal places. Example: 89%
Response is treated as an attribute to the clarification sent.
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range. (Start and End Date)
Instance Response Date may or may not fall in the selected activity date range.
Clarifications may or may not have a FINAL response.
Clarifications with response other than Pending, Retracted, or No Response are considered.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Quality ’ in the admin configuration is a Quality Impact Clarification.
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

Quality Clarification Response Rate= (The count of Quality Impact clarifications with at least one instance responded in the selected activity date range/ The count of Quality Impact clarifications with at-least one instance sent in the selected activity date range) x 100
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
This metric displays the count of Quality Impact Clarificationsagreed in the selected activity date range.
Response is treated as an attribute to the clarification sent.
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range. (Start and End Date)
Response Date/time of the 'Agreed' instance may or may not fall in the selected activity date range.
Clarifications may or may not have a FINAL response.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Quality’ in the admin configuration is a Quality Impact Clarification.
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
This metric displays the percentage of responded Quality Impact clarifications agreed in the selected activity date range.
Rounded to 0 decimal places. Example: 89%
Instance Response Date falls in the selected activity date range.
Response Date/time of the 'Agreed' instance falls in the selected activity date range.
Clarification Instance may or may not have a FINAL response.
Clarifications with response other than Pending, Retracted, or No Response are considered as responded.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Quality ’ in the admin configuration is a Quality Impact Clarification.

Quality Clarification Agreed Rate = (The count of Quality Impact Clarifications agreed in the selected activity date range (Response Date/time of the 'Agreed' instance falls in the selected activity date range)/ the count of Quality Impact clarifications with at least one instance responded in the selected activity date range) x 100
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation

row.entry:
This metric displays the count of Both Impact clarification with at-least one instance sent in the selected activity date range.
Note:
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial and Quality’ in the admin configuration is considered as BOTH.
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

entry.p: This metric displays the percentage of Both Impact Clarifications sent in the selected activity date range.
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial and Quality’ in the admin configuration is considered as BOTH.
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

row.entry: % Both Impact Clarification = (The count of Both Impact clarification with at-least one instance in the selected activity date range. / The count of clarifications with at-least one instance in the selected activity date range.) X100. Rounded off to 0 decimal places. E.g. 30%

This column displays the count of Both Impact clarifications with at least one instance responded against the Both Impact Clarifications sent in the selected activity date range.
Note:
Response is treated as an attribute to the clarification sent.
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range. (Start and End Date)
Clarifications may or may not have a FINAL response.
Clarifications with response other than Pending, Retracted, or No Response are considered.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial and Quality’ in the admin configuration is considered as BOTH.
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

This column displays the percentage of sent Both Impact clarifications responded against the Both Impact Clarifications sent in the selected activity date range.
Note:
Response is treated as an attribute to the clarification sent.
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range. (Start and End Date)
Instance Response Date may or may not fall in the selected activity date range.
Clarifications may or may not have a FINAL response.
Clarifications with response other than Pending, Retracted, or No Response are considered.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial and Quality’ in the admin configuration is considered as BOTH.
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

Both Impact Clarification Response Rate= (The count of Both Impact clarifications with at least one instance responded against the Both Impact Clarifications sent in the selected activity date range/ The count of Both Impact clarifications with at-least one instance sent in the selected activity date range) x 100. Rounded to 0 decimal places. E.g. 89%

This column displays the count of Both Impact Clarifications agreed against the Both Impact Clarifications sent in the selected activity date range.
Note:
Response is treated as an attribute to the clarification sent.
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range. (Start and End Date)
Response Date/time of the 'Agreed' instance may or may not fall in the selected activity date range.
Clarifications may or may not have a FINAL response.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial and Quality’ in the admin configuration is considered as BOTH.
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

entry.p: This column displays the percentage of responded Both Impact clarifications agreed against the Both Impact Clarifications sent in the selected activity date range.
Response is treated as an attribute to the clarification sent.
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range. (Start and End Date)
Instance Response Date may/may not fall in the selected activity date range.
Response Date/time of the 'Agreed' instance may/may not in the selected activity date range.
Clarifications may or may not have a FINAL response.
Clarifications with response other than Pending, Retracted, or No Response are considered as responded.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial and Quality’ in the admin configuration is considered as BOTH.
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

row.entry: Both Impact Clarification Agreed Rate = (The count of Both Impact Clarifications agreed against the Both Impact clarifications sent in the selected activity date range (Response Date/time of the 'Agreed' instance may/may not fall in the selected activity date range)/ the count of Both Impact clarifications with at least one instance responded against the Both Impact clarifications sent in the selected activity date range) x 100. Rounded to 0 decimal places. E.g. 89%

entry.p: This metric displays the count of reviewed encounters with at least one SEV Impact clarification sent in the selected activity date range.
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ as SEV are considered.
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.
This metric displays the percentage of reviewed Encounters with SEV Impact Clarifications sent in the selected activity date range.
Rounded off to 0 decimal places. Example: 30%
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range.
Initial Review Date falls in the selected activity date range.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ as SEV are considered.

SEV Clarification Rate = (Count of reviewed encounters with at least one SEV Impact clarification with the status other than DELETED or RETRACTED sent in the selected activity date range. / Count of encounters with an initial review date in the selected activity date range.) X 100
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.
This metric displays the count of SEV Impact clarification with at-least one instance sent in the selected activity date range.
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ as SEV are considered.
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
This metric displays the percentage of SEV Impact Clarifications sent in the selected activity date range.
Rounded off to 0 decimal places. Example: 30%
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ as SEV are considered.

% SEV Clarification = (The count of SEV Impact clarification with at-least one instance in the selected activity date range. / The count of clarifications with at-least one instance in the selected activity date range.) X100
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
This metric displays the count of SEV Impact clarifications with at least one instance responded in the selected activity date range.
Response is treated as an attribute to the clarification sent.
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range. (Start and End Date)
Instance Response Date may or may not fall in the selected activity date range.
Clarifications may or may not have a FINAL response.
Clarifications with response other than Pending, Retracted, or No Response are considered.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ as SEV are considered.
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
This metric displays the percentage of sent SEV Impact clarifications responded in the selected activity date range.
Rounded to 0 decimal places. Example: 89%
Response is treated as an attribute to the clarification sent.
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range. (Start and End Date)
Instance Response Date may or may not fall in the selected activity date range.
Clarifications may or may not have a FINAL response.
Clarifications with response other than Pending, Retracted, or No Response are considered.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ as SEV are considered.
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

SEV Clarification Response Rate= (The count of SEV Impact clarifications with at least one instance responded in the selected activity date range/ The count of SEV Impact clarifications with at-least one instance sent in the selected activity date range) x 100
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
This metric displays the count of SEV Impact Clarificationsagreed in the selected activity date range.
Response is treated as an attribute to the clarification sent.
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range. (Start and End Date).
Response Date/time of the 'Agreed' instance may or may not fall in the selected activity date range.
Clarifications may or may not have a FINAL response.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ as SEV are considered.
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
This metric displays the percentage of responded SEV Impact clarifications agreed in the selected activity date range.
Rounded to 0 decimal places. Example: 89%
Response is treated as an attribute to the clarification sent.
Clarification Instance Sent Date falls in the selected activity date range. (Start and End Date)
Instance Response Date may or may not fall in the selected activity date range.
Response Date/time of the 'Agreed' instance may or may not in the selected activity date range.
Clarifications may or may not have a FINAL response.
Clarifications with response other than Pending, Retracted, or No Response are considered as responded.
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ as SEV are considered.
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

SEV Clarification Agreed Rate = (The count of SEV Impact Clarifications agreed in the selected activity date range (Response Date/time of the 'Agreed' instance falls in the selected activity date range)/ the count of SEV Impact clarifications with at least one instance responded in the selected activity date range) x 100
Clarifications with Status 'DELETED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
This metric displays the count of Matched Encounters in the selected activity date range.
The total count of encounters with Match Value = Y

p.note: We can determine if there is a encounter for which an activity was performed in the selected activity date range, Same for rate as well.

entry.p: This logic applies to all the reconciled cases. (Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled No Impact, Auto-Reconciled)
This logic applies to all grouper types (including MS-DRG and APR Groupers)
Reconciliation Assessment DRG is not used to calculate the CDS/Coder Match.
CDS/Coder Match logic compares Final Coded DRG to the Possible DRG (Or Working DRG when the Possible DRG is blank).
For the reconciled encounters with Possible DRG, CDS/Coder match is Y when the Final Coded DRG matches Possible DRG
For the reconciled encounters without Possible DRG (Possible DRG is blank), CDS/Coder match is Y when the Final Coded DRG matches working DRG.
Matched Encounters = Count of Reconciled Encounters where Final DRG matches Possible DRG (Working DRG if Possible DRG is Blank)
This metric displays the CDS/Coder Match Rate for the selected activity date range.

CDS/Coder Match Rate = Count of Reconciled Encounters in which Final DRG matches Possible DRG (Or Working DRG if Possible DRG is Blank) / Count of Reconciled Encounters in the selected date range) *100

ul.li: Displays the activity date range here. You can select required dates from the date lookup.

li.p: Default: Last 1 calendar months date range

entry.note: Activity Date slicer considers the Facility's timezone to filter and display the data.

ul.li: With the Reset button, you can reset the Activity date range.
Tooltip: Use "Ctrl + Click" to reset the Activity Date.
Displays a list of active and inactive facilities that you have access to. The list is sorted alphabetically.
You can select multiple facilities
You can search the facility by Facility ID or Description.
Format: Facility Description (Facility ID)
Default: ALL
Displays a list of active and inactive payers associated with the facilities that you have access to. The list is sorted alphabetically.
You can select multiple payers
"Unassigned Payer" displays data for the encounters that do not have a payer assigned.
You can search the Payer by Payer ID or Description.
Format: Payer Description (Payer ID)
Default: ALL
Displays a list of active and inactive CDSs associated with the facilities you have access to.
The CDS Filter in all the reports displays the users with at-least CDS or CDS Manager role assigned.
"Unassigned CDS" displays data for the encounters that do not have a CDS assigned.
Format: Last Name, First Name MI (CDS ID)
Default: ALL

Displays the available patient types.
Example: Inpatient, Outpatient.
Default: Inpatient
Displays the list of available units.
You can select multiple Units.
You can search the Unit.
Default: ALL
Displays the list of available Admit Services.
You can select multiple Admit Services.
You can search the Admit Service.
Default: ALL
Displays the list of available Visit Types.
You can select multiple visit types.
You can search the Visit Type.
Default: ALL
Displays the available options for Weekend Only Stay- Y and N
You can select more than one option.
Weekend Only Stay = Y ( Unassigned encounters admitted after Friday, 6PM and Discharged before Sunday, 11.59 PM)

row.entry: (Count of reviewed encounters with at least one clarification with the status other than REMOVED or RETRACTED sent in the selected activity date range/ Count of Initial Reviews performed in the selected activity date range) X 100 ; E.g. 33%

(Count of clarifications with at least one instance responded in the selected activity date range/ The count of clarification with at-least one instance sent in the selected activity date range) X 100 ; E.g. 80%

(Count of Clarifications agreed in the selected activity date range (Response Date/time of the 'Agreed' instance falls in the selected activity date range)/ The count of clarifications with at-least one instance responded in the selected activity date range) X 100 ; E.g. 90%
Financial Impact Clarifications: Clarifications with standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial’ in the admin configuration.

Financial Impact Clarification Rate = (The count of reviewed encounters with at least one Financial Impact Clarification with the status other than REMOVED or RETRACTED/Encounters Reviewed (Initial Reviews) ) x 100). E.g. 30%

(Count of Financial Impact clarification with at-least one instance in the selected activity date range/ The count of clarifications with at-least one instance in the selected activity date range.) X100 ; E.g. 75%

Count of Financial Impact clarifications with at least one instance responded in the selected activity date range/ The count of Financial Impact clarifications with at-least one instance sent in the selected activity date range) x 100 ; E.g. 75%

(Count of Financial Impact Clarifications agreed in the selected activity date range/ Count of Financial Impact clarifications with at least one instance responded in the selected activity date range) x 100. E.g. 90%
Quality Clarifications: Clarifications with standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Quality’ in the admin configuration.

(Count of reviewed encounters with at least one Quality Impact clarification with the status other than REMOVED or RETRACTED sent in the selected activity date range/Count of encounters with an initial review date in the selected activity date range)x100 ; E.g. 56%.

(Count of Quality Impact clarification with at-least one instance in the selected activity date range. / Count of clarifications with at-least one instance in the selected activity date range.) X100 ; E.g. 44%

(Count of Quality Impact clarifications with at least one instance responded in the selected activity date range/ Count of Quality Impact clarifications with at-least one instance sent in the selected activity date range) x 100 ; E.g. 88%

(Count of Quality Impact Clarifications agreed in the selected activity date range / Count of Quality Impact clarifications with at least one instance responded in the selected activity date range) x 100 ; E.g. 100%
Both Impact Clarifications: Clarifications with standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as 'Financial' and ‘Quality’ in the administrator configuration.

(Count of Both Impact clarification with at least one instance in the selected activity date range/Count of clarifications with at least one instance in the selected activity date range.)x100. E.g. 31%.

(Count of Both Impact clarifications with at least one instance responded in the selected activity date range/count of Both Impact clarifications with at least one instance sent in the selected activity date range)x100. E.g. 31%.

(Count of Both Impact Clarifications agreed in the selected activity date range/Count of Both Impact clarifications with at least one instance responded in the selected activity date range)x100. E.g. 95%.
SEV Clarifications: Clarifications with ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ as SEV.

(Count of SEV Impact clarifications with at least one instance in the selected activity date range/count of clarifications with at least one instance sent in the selected activity date range) x 100 ; E.g. 70%

(Count of reviewed encounters with at least one SEV Impact clarification with the status other than REMOVED or RETRACTED sent in the selected activity date range/Count of encounters with an initial review date in the selected activity date range)x100 ; E.g. 31%

(Count of SEV Impact clarifications with at least one instance responded in the selected activity date range/ Count of SEV Impact clarifications with at-least one instance sent in the selected activity date range) x 100 ; E.g. 70%

(Count of SEV Impact Clarifications agreed in the selected activity date range / Count of SEV Impact clarifications with at least one instance responded in the selected activity date range) x 100 ; E.g. 98%

CDS/Coder Match Rate = (Count of Reconciled Encounters in which Final DRG matches Possible DRG (Or Working DRG if Possible DRG is Blank) / Count of Reconciled Encounters in the selected activity date range) X100. E.g. 90%
